title: BetterRedstone
description: A resource pack that helps you with redstone
body:
## A resource pack that helps you build your redstone buildings a lot easier :D

![(Almost) All the textures and models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cc23806b3fdea2f99cd36e553293a66bfae8d60.jpeg)

## This pack now only supports versions 1.21 to 26.1.2, 1.18.2 support will be soon!

## Features:
• Redstone dusts show their power level (from Vanilla Tweaks)

• Redstone torch uses the 1.21.2 model even if you play below that version

• Redstone lamp uses clean, crossless texture (inspired by Redstone Tweaks)

• Lever has trench to show their power state (from Vanilla Tweaks)

• Repeater shows its tick delay and comparator shows its mode (inspired by CodeCrafted)

• Clean wool (inspired by CodeCrafted)

• Note block shows its pitch

• Composter, cauldron and bee nest/beehive have their stage displayed on the side (from Vanilla Tweaks)

• Dispenser, dropper, observer and hopper now show their direction (from Vanilla Tweaks)

• Slime is displayed on the side of the sticky piston (from Vanilla Tweaks)

• Music disc names show their power level (from Vanilla Tweaks)

• Sculk sensor and daylight detector show their power level

• And many more!
